title: Roman Scandals
writer: George S. Kaufman, Robert E. Sherwood, William Anthony McGuire
actors: Eddie Cantor, Ruth Etting, Gloria Stuart
plot: A kind-hearted young man is thrown out of his corrupt hometown of West Rome, Oklahoma. He falls asleep and dreams that he is back in the days of old Rome, where he gets mixed up with court intrigue and a murder plot against the Em...
